title: Best Cyber Security & Digital Forensics Programs in Noida
content: The School of Computing Science and Engineering introduces this program to provide a platform to undergraduate students for a prospective career in upcoming Cyber Security & Digital Forensics industry. The programme encompasses comprehensive knowledge of Cyber Crime, digital forensics, Network Security, Data structures, Design and Analysis of Algorithms, Cryptography, Intrusion Detection and Prevention Systems. Students graduating from the proposed program will have significantly more depth and breadth in the broad area of Cyber Security & Digital Forensics. The curriculum is designed in close collaboration with industry which includes in-demand tools and technologies. For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 60% marks or equivalent 2) 60% PCM or above at XII level. 01 02 03 01 02 The students of Computer Science and Engineering shall demonstrate Engineering Practice learned through industry internship and research project to solve live problems in various domains For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 60% marks or equivalent 2) 60% PCM or above at XII level.
